hotels.name: Sangat Island Dive Resort
hotels.description_fr:
Set in a secluded cove near some of Coron's most spectacular dive sites, Sangat offers a unique eco-friendly escape in Palawan. The resort features fan-cooled bungalows and a villa with private entrances and balconies overlooking the sea or hillside. All stays include full-board meals, WiFi, and roundtrip airport transfers.
Each unit has a private bathroom with ambient temperature (cold-water) showers, in line with the resortâ€™s sustainable design. Three chalets are equipped with air-conditioning and hot showers for added comfort.
Guests can enjoy a range of activities including scuba diving, snorkeling, island hopping, kayaking, and massages, all arranged by the friendly staff fluent in English and the local language. A safety deposit box and laundry services are also available.
